queries.question: Show me all the Oscar-winning DreamWorks cartoons and Pixar cartoons.
queries.sql:
SELECT MovieDetails.movieTitle 
FROM AnimationStudios JOIN MovieDetails ON AnimationStudios.id = MovieDetails.animationStudioId JOIN MovieAwards ON MovieDetails.id = MovieAwards.movieId JOIN Awards ON MovieAwards.awardId = Awards.id
WHERE AnimationStudios.studioName = "Pixar" AND Awards.awardName = "Oscar"
UNION
SELECT MovieDetails.movieTitle 
FROM AnimationStudios JOIN MovieDetails ON AnimationStudios.id = MovieDetails.animationStudioId JOIN MovieAwards ON MovieDetails.id = MovieAwards.movieId JOIN Awards ON MovieAwards.awardId = Awards.id
WHERE AnimationStudios.studioName = "DreamWorks" AND Awards.awardName = "Oscar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?animationstudios a :AnimationStudios .
    ?moviedetails a :MovieDetails .
    ?moviedetails p:hasAnimationStudios ?animationstudios .
    ?movieawards a :MovieAwards .
    ?movieawards p:hasMovieDetails ?moviedetails .
    ?awards a :Awards .
    ?movieawards p:hasAwards ?awards .
    ?moviedetails p:movieTitle ?movietitle .
    ?animationstudios p:studioName ?studioname_f .
    ?awards p:awardName ?awardname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?studioname_f) = "Pixar")
    FILTER(STR(?awardname_f) = "Oscar")
    BIND(?movietitle AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?animationstudios a :AnimationStudios .
    ?moviedetails a :MovieDetails .
    ?moviedetails p:hasAnimationStudios ?animationstudios .
    ?movieawards a :MovieAwards .
    ?movieawards p:hasMovieDetails ?moviedetails .
    ?awards a :Awards .
    ?movieawards p:hasAwards ?awards .
    ?moviedetails p:movieTitle ?movietitle .
    ?animationstudios p:studioName ?studioname_f .
    ?awards p:awardName ?awardname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?studioname_f) = "DreamWorks")
    FILTER(STR(?awardname_f) = "Oscar")
    BIND(?movietitle AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show me all the Oscar-winning DreamWorks cartoons and Pixar cartoons.
queries.sql:
SELECT MovieDetails.movieTitle 
FROM MovieDetails JOIN AnimationStudios ON MovieDetails.animationStudioId = AnimationStudios.id WHERE AnimationStudios.studioName = "Pixar"
UNION
SELECT MovieDetails.movieTitle 
FROM AnimationStudios JOIN MovieDetails ON AnimationStudios.id = MovieDetails.animationStudioId JOIN MovieAwards ON MovieDetails.id = MovieAwards.movieId JOIN Awards ON MovieAwards.awardId = Awards.id
WHERE AnimationStudios.studioName = "DreamWorks" AND Awards.awardName = "Oscar"

    ?movieawards p:hasMovieDetails ?moviedetails .
